titleStmt.title: SII 28.68: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 68. (A.R. No. 66-A of 1913.) TIRUCHCHEṄGĀṬṬĀṄGUḌI, NANNILAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Uttarāpatīśvara temple, Gaṇapatīśvara shrine, north wall of the maṇḍapa in front.

This is a continuation of No. 66 above but refers to a different plot of land of good-grade (taram peṟṟa) on the border of this ūr (Tiruchcheṅgāṭṭaṅguḍi) purchased from 4 individuals (the land is stated to be iṟaiyāṉ-kuḍiyāna-kāḍu out of the Marukal-kō land) by birāmaṇi Alliyaṅgōdai-ammai for laying out the pathway for the procession of Chīrāḷa-ppillaiyār to Tirumarukal from the tiru-māḷigai of Chiṟuttoṇḍa dēvar in Tiruchcheṅgāṭṭaṅguḍi. The upādi-paḻaviṟai (recounted in detail) in respect of that land was either exempted or fixed at a concessional rate from year 18, piśānam. The list of the signatories is identical with No. 66.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yāṇṭu 10 8vatu 3 10000 3 1000ṉāl nīṅkalāka nīk
kiṉapaṭikku Uḷvarippaṭi keyamāṇikkavaḷaṉāṭ
ṭu marukalṉāṭṭu marukal ko nilam Iṟaiyāṉkuṭiyāṉa
kkāṭu rūpāy 1 muntiri ki mukkāl � 1muntiriṉāl � vata niccayi
tta pon_ [9�] Itaṉuḷ Iṉṉāṭṭut tirucceṅkāṭṭaṅkuṭiyi
l ciṟuttoṇṭatevar tirumāḷikaiyil niṉṟum cirāḷap pi
ḷḷaiyār tirumarukalil Eḻuntaruḷum vaḻi tiruvītiyākac ceyya Ivvū
r Ellaiyil Akappaṭṭa nilamāyk kaṭuvaṉkuṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ tiru
ñāṉacampantaṉāṉa Irājavallavap pallavarayaṉum karuppūru
ṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ periyāṉāṉa civapātacekara
muventaveḷāṉum tattainallūruṭaiyāṉ Arayaṉ tiru
naṭṭaṉum kuṟukkaiyuṭaiyāṉ mātava kaṉnampi
yāḻvāṉum pakkal pirāmaṇi Alliyaṅkotai Ammai
vilai koṇṭu nīrvārttuk kuṭutta nila
māy ṉṉuṭaiyārum Iṟaikaṭṭuk
kuṭalāy varukiṟapaṭiyun tavirntu yāṇṭu
10 8āvatu picāṉa mutal niṅkalāka nīkki
tarampeṟṟa rūpāy (1/4)� ṉāl nil Opāti
paḻaviṟai pon_ 1000 100 mukkāl � niccayitta Opā
ti pon_ 1000 ta mūn_ṛumā � nikki rūpāy10 8(1/2)sam
1muntiriki � 1muntiriṉāl poṉ �
� 1muntiri niccayitta poṉ �
Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇanāyaka melūruṭai
yāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravari śrīkaraṇat
tu mukaveṭṭi perumaṅkalamuṭaiyā
ṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyaka
m perunāvalūruṭaiyāṉeḻuttu I
vai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi pan
taṇainallūruṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai
puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi kumāramaṅka
lamuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrī
karaṇanāyakam pālaiyūr kiḻavaṉeḻuttu
Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam kuḻalūruṭai
yāṉeḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇat
tu mukaveṭṭi Uḻuntaiyuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu
Ivai kacciyarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai
paḻantiyarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai va
ṉṉāṭuṭaiyāṉeḻuttu Ivai
vijaiyarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai cera
koṉeḻuttu Ivai tipattarayaṉeḻu
ttu Ivai cīppoyaṉeḻuttu Ivai
veṇāṭṭarayaṉeḻuttu Ivai nuḷam
pādhirājaṉeḻuttu Ivai vāṇādhirāja
ṉeḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 28.68 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
